tracks.rawText: 5:08Hustle & Grow - Kundalini Heat [050nUTEs2u8]UploadProgressive psytrance with cinematic orchestral elements, Features a driving 138 BPM tempo in the key of G minor, The track is built around a tight, percussive bassline that follows a galloping triplet rhythm, A prominent staccato string section plays rhythmic ostinatos, layered with a brass ensemble performing dramatic swells and stabs, Synthesizers include a resonant, acid-style lead with automated filter cutoff and a high-pitched, arpeggiated pluck, Percussion consists of a heavy, punchy kick drum, sharp open hi-hats on the off-beats, and complex 16th-note shaker patterns, A breakdown section features a solo operatic female vocal performing wordless melismatic runs with heavy hall reverb, Transition effects include white noise risers, reverse cymbal crashes, and pitch-shifted synth sweeps, The arrangement alternates between dense, high-energy drops and atmospheric, orchestral-focused segments2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Hustle & Grow - Kundalini Heat [050nUTEs2u8]

tracks.rawText: 3:33Seal- Kiss From A Rose (Marc Martel 1996 Cover) [Xs9dvKDqe9g]v5.5CoverCore sound: Genre-fluid sonic architecture blending reggae-dub, techno, electronic, and global rhythms, Built around groove, emotional impact, and cinematic atmosphere, designed for both dancefloor energy and deep listening experiences, Lyrics & mood: Hybrid storytelling that moves between introspection, sensuality, ambition, and transcendence, Hooks are immediate and memorable, often chant-driven, with a balance between poetic depth and viral simplicity, Production palette: Deep sub-bass, textured percussion, offbeat grooves, evolving synthscapes, and spatial FX (delay, reverb, modulation), Frequent use of contrast: minimal vs explosive, silence vs impact, analog warmth vs futuristic digital textures, Language & vocals: Bilingual flow (English/Spanish) with global accessibility, Vocals range from melodic, hypnotic singing to rhythmic, charismatic delivery, Focus on identity, tone, and presence over perfection, Artistic direction: Not bound to genres — each track is a world, DesignPublishRemix
tracks.title: Seal- Kiss From A Rose (Marc Martel 1996 Cover) [Xs9dvKDqe9g]
